headline: California Fire Spread Slows on Calm Winds After Evacuations
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The spread of a brush fire in Southern California’s Simi Valley has slowed after winds fanning the flames eased, with hundreds of firefighters working through the night to contain the blaze.Most Read from BloombergUS Lawmakers Plan New $130 Fee for Electric Vehicle OwnersBillionaire Rinehart Bets $100 Million on US Defense StocksStocks and Oil Whipsaw on Mixed US-Iran Signals: Markets WrapTrump Says Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf AppealElon Musk Loses Case Against Sam

headline: JP Morgan Raises Edison International (EIX) PT for the Second Time in Two Weeks
summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is included among the Top 12 Undervalued Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is one of the largest electric utility holding companies in America, focused on providing clean and reliable energy and energy services through its independent companies. On May 15, JPMorgan slightly raised its price target on Edison International […]

headline: A Look At Edison International (EIX) Valuation After New Eaton Fire Lawsuits And Recovery Program Update
summary: Recent legal filings related to the Eaton Fire and an update on wildfire compensation have brought Edison International (EIX) back into focus, as investors weigh potential liability in relation to the scale of its recovery efforts. See our latest analysis for Edison International. Against this backdrop, Edison International’s share price has eased in the short term, with a 7 day share price return down 3.03% and 30 day share price return down 3.26%. However, its year to date share price...

headline: California Fire Spread Slows But Dangerous Conditions Linger
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Winds that drove a fast-moving brush fire across Southern California’s Simi Valley eased overnight, slowing the blaze’s spread, but dangerous conditions persist as hundreds of firefighters tackle the flames.Most Read from BloombergUS Lawmakers Plan New $130 Fee for Electric Vehicle OwnersBillionaire Rinehart Bets $100 Million on US Defense StocksTrump Says Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf AppealElon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s OverhaulStocks and Oil
